title: vulpia megalura
intro: Vulpia megalura, also known as the large fox-tail grass, is a type of grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Vulpia megalura include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as its use in treating respiratory problems like bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Vulpia megalura can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
